summary: Implemented Stage 9A reusable insight contract validation with typed InsightRecord payload validation, confidence-label enforcement, provenance evidence checks, and focused tests.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
uv run --no-sync ruff check src\codex_supervisor\insights.py tests\test_insights.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache
uv run --no-sync ruff format --check src\codex_supervisor\insights.py tests\test_insights.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache

tests_run.summary: 334 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Reusable insight records have a typed va.evidence: InsightRecord and validate_insight_record_payload cover claim, confidence, evidence, scope, supersedes, and next_action/next action with the confidence labels from insights/README.md.

Validation rejects missing required fiel.evidence: tests/test_insights.py covers invalid confidence labels, missing evidence, blank evidence entries, blank scope, blank next_action, and blank supersedes entries.

The validation surface preserves provena.evidence: src/codex_supervisor/insights.py is a pure validation module with no filesystem, SQLite, or planning-store imports, preserving evidence/scope/supersedes/next_action as typed fields.

Focused tests cover valid records, inval.evidence: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider passed with coverage for valid payloads, markdown next action labels, invalid confidence, missing fields, and blank values.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 9A diff.

risks: The validation surface is intentionally pure and does not yet include a CLI command or automatic insight-file updates.
Stage 9 skill promotion and golden eval execution remain future slices.
follow_up_tasks: Shape a Stage 9B slice for knowledge graph update workflows or golden skill eval fixtures.
Consider a later CLI wrapper once insight validation is used by more than one workflow.
handoff_notes: Stage 9A adds pure reusable insight validation in insights.py. Future knowledge-graph and skill-learning writers can validate claim, confidence, evidence, scope, supersedes, and next_action before recording durable learning.
